text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru has been weighed down with
fatigue, so I decide to take her to the infirmary to
rest.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Pshhh! Leave this to me! Resting is one of my best
talents, second only to divination!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it is! Anyway, good night!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where am I?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This feels so mystical... It can only be the work of
Shiraoki! What do you request of me, my great?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Something fell just now! What's this?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whoa! It's a daruma doll!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That brings back memories... The great Shiraoki
offered me one of these in a dream.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to that gift, I didn't give up after that
track and field event, even though I got last
place...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And even though it hurt when my sister won... that
doll made it hurt just a little less! Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I was such a crybaby back then... Now I stay
positive and keep on running.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Just like Shiraoki said! "The more you run, the
more possibilities will come upon you."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that dream just now brought back some
good memories. This is definitely a sign of good
luck to come!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yippee! I'm full of energy! O Shiraoki, I still have
a ton more races left in me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Isn't this the test I failed the other day?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The results were so tragic that I offered them up
in a secret burning ritual... So why is it here?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You disappointing scrap of paper! To the afterlife
with you! Go on, shoo!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ack!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... What a terrible nightmare...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to shake off what she saw in her dream,
Matikanefukukitaru does not get much rest.
